plugins.name: ido4shape
plugins.description: A thinking partner that helps crystallize what needs to be built. Guides product managers, founders, and tech leads through creative, non-linear conversation until understanding is deep enough to produce a structured specification artifact.

plugins.name: ido4dev
plugins.description: The platform that makes AI-hybrid software development work at scale — specs-driven, methodology-aware, with full project context for every AI coding session. 21 skills, 4 agents, 57 MCP tools.
